target_area.description: Page 10 Ethical Considerations risk-reporting paragraph and adjacent References start

change_summary: Changed 'intended render use' to 'intended use' to remove a visible line-end split.
Changed the VLM reporting sentence to use 'VLMs' and 'failures that alter task cues' instead of the longer material-change/object-affordance phrasing.
Changed 'synthetic-scene success as real-world transfer' to 'success in synthetic scenes as transfer to real settings'.
Added 'They mark the evidence boundary' to keep the disclosure rule explicit and preserve the References heading at the top of page 10 right column.

observations: Before: page 10 Ethical Considerations rendered 'intended ren-' followed by 'der use'.
Before: the same paragraph rendered 'object af-' followed by 'fordances'.
Before: the same paragraph rendered 'synthetic-scene suc-' followed by 'cess'.
After: the accepted paragraph removes the three targeted splits and keeps the disclosure obligation tied to an evidence boundary.
After: References begins at the top of the right column on page 10, not at the bottom of the left column.
After: page 9 Discussion, Limitations, and Conclusion structure remains stable, and Figure 4 remains above the ethics block.
Rejected: a shorter VLM sentence moved the References heading to the bottom of the left column.
Rejected: other intermediate sentences introduced new 'con-', 'real-', 'ac-', 'dis-', 'ev-', or 'ma-' line-end splits.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|LaTeX Warning: Label|There were undefined references|Undefined control sequence|multiply-defined|Rerun to get cross-references right|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

verification.evidence: ok=true; no violations or unsafe figure violations.
